hypothesis: G22 cap5: a closed-option selector can select by option ID from raw deterministic candidates plus prediction-time G21-style constructed options while preserving traceability and fixed scorer, loader, split, bridge, candidate-builder, constructor, label-construction, and prediction-repair semantics.
metric_caveats: This cap5 run is a traceability smoke gate only, not a mechanism-performance estimate.
The varied factor is target selection over closed answer options; the model must select an option ID and cannot free-write a final label.

Constructed options are generated from note text at prediction time by gan.frequency.aggregation_constructor.v1 in open-attempt mode, de-duplicated against raw candidate labels, and are not gated by gold, reference labels, G19 row classes, or G17 buckets.
Post-hoc G19/G17/G21 row ledgers are reporting overlays only and are not visible to the model.
Run-level metrics use gan2026_paper_reproduction with repair/range/tolerance disabled; canonical gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 is diagnostic sensitivity only.
